CVE-2026-46373.title: SQLFluff is a modular SQL linter and auto-formatter with support  ...
CVE-2026-46373.description: SQLFluff is a modular SQL linter and auto-formatter with support for multiple dialects and templated code. Prior to version 4.1.0, in deployments where untrusted users can provide SQL queries to be linted, an untrusted user can submit a malicious query with deliberate excessive nesting to any application using the parser to trigger a Denial of Service through resource exhaustion. This issue has been patched in version 4.1.0.

CVE-2026-46374.title: SQLFluff is a modular SQL linter and auto-formatter with support  ...
CVE-2026-46374.description: SQLFluff is a modular SQL linter and auto-formatter with support for multiple dialects and templated code. Prior to version 4.2.0, in deployments where untrusted users can provide SQL queries to be linted, an untrusted user can submit a malicious long query to any application using the parser to trigger a Denial of Service through resource exhaustion. This issue has been patched in version 4.2.0.
